title: teucrium polium subsp. aurasiacum
intro: Teucrium polium subsp. aurasiacum, also known as the Herb of Hercules, is a subspecies of the Teucrium polium plant, a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and protecting against certain diseases due to its high antioxidant content. Teucrium polium subsp. aurasiacum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs for its potential therapeutic effects.
